title: Refocus Realtime Collaboration feature on pub/sub and live updates
description: Update the existing Realtime Collaboration feature entry to focus exclusively on the UDS/MQTT pub-sub messaging, gossip protocol, and live collaboration capabilities. Remove references to Git as SSOT (too technical for the home page) and the storage model, since that will now be its own feature. Update: the description in features.ts, the feature detail page at features/realtime-collaboration.tsx, and any related docs page.
creator: ryan.porter
